A1.purpose: animated/autotile living systems: coolant pools, conduits, steam, sparks

A2.purpose: ground autotiles: cave rock, flagstone, metal, catwalk, obsidian, dust, circuit floor, coolant stain

A4.purpose: wall autotiles: rock, hewn block, bulkhead, conduit, breach, glyph, obsidian mirror

A5.purpose: normal tiles: entrance seals, stairs, dais, grates, glow strips, hatch, rubble

B.purpose: terminal banks and Chamber 2 console objects; top-left tile transparent

passability_notes.O: floors, catwalks, glow strips, shallow decals
passability_notes.X: walls, pillars, terminals, rigs, pedestal, boulders, rubble, crates
passability_notes.star: light shafts, hanging cables, ceiling stalactites, banners, radial glow decals
